payload.answer: Denied. A normal user cannot run admin SQL or delete memory cards. No memory was changed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user, not a user fact suitable for durable memory.

details: Rejected unauthorized admin command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No durable memory was committed, modified, or deleted.

repair_options: If you need to remove a specific memory, request deletion through the supported user-facing memory deletion flow.
If you believe you should have admin access, authenticate through the proper administrative channel.
